backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the press kit backend with content management, user profiles, admin initialization, and password protection using AccessControl and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and any notable fixes applied.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell entry point loading Fredoka One and Inter fonts from Google Fonts and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with three routes (/, /press-kit, /admin), wrapping the app in ThemeProvider, and applying dynamic body text color from backend content.
frontend/src/components/FullscreenViewer: Fullscreen image overlay dialog with Escape key support, close button, and click-to-close behavior.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Site header with navigation links to the press kit and a dark/light mode toggle button; hidden on the /admin route.
frontend/src/components/ImageWithFallbac: Image component that shows an animated loading skeleton while loading and an 'Image unavailable' placeholder on error.
frontend/src/components/MediaDownloadBut: Button that triggers a direct browser download of the press kit ZIP file using a programmatically created anchor element.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterPlaceh: Non-functional newsletter signup form UI with email input and subscribe button; submission handler is a placeholder.
frontend/src/components/PasswordGateModa: Theme-aware modal that gates access to the press kit by verifying a password against the backend, persisting success in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/ScreenshotsGalle: Responsive 2–3 column grid of six hardcoded screenshot images with click-to-fullscreen support via FullscreenViewer.
frontend/src/components/SocialMediaSecti: Conditionally rendered Instagram icon link that only displays when a valid URL is provided, with theme-aware color inversion.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Renders a video section that shows a thumbnail with a play button, and replaces it with an embedded YouTube iframe when clicked.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for light/dark theme management, persisting the preference to localStorage and toggling a 'dark' class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend content (about, features, game details, social links, password protection, etc.) via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and utility styles for backgrounds, logos, screenshots, and transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that allows authenticated users to view and update press kit content fields (about, features, game details, social links, password protection) with per-field save feedback.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page displaying the game logo, description, a link to the press kit, and a newsletter placeholder, with a footer crediting caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/pages/PressKitPage.tsx: Press kit page that fetches CMS content, shows a password gate modal when enabled, and renders sections for video, about, features, game details, screenshots, social media, and media downloads.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Fredoka One, Inter), OKLCH-based design tokens, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing the architecture, existing features, and known issues for a black-and-white game press kit site with an Internet Identity-protected admin CMS and password-gated press kit page.
